column6: Five refilled propane tanks, picked up from the Okanagan Family Fair, where they were set to be discarded. Ready for use and a great way to repurpose!

Discover a premium selection of cacao products from São Jorge Farm in Itabuna, Bahia, Brazil—crafted through regenerative cabruca agroforestry under the Atlantic Rainforest canopy for sustainable, terroir-driven depth.

These are blend of Trinitario, Forastero, and Criolla beans, fermented for 7 days and sun-dried, yield a complex flavor profile emphasizing nutty richness as the star: roasted almonds and hazelnuts with smooth, mild astringency. Layered beneath are chocolaty and woody notes of dark oak, dried fruits and caramelized sweetness like raisins and panela, bright tropical fruits and citrus accents of pineapple and zest, and elegant floral and fruity acidity with jasmine and green banana for a lingering, clean finish.

What's Included:

10 × 500g bars of cacao mass
125 × 40g bars of cacao mass
44 × 8oz kraft pouches of cacao nibs

Ideal for artisanal chocolatiers, home bakers, and sustainability enthusiasts seeking bold, eco-friendly indulgence with authentic Bahia terroir.

Nestled near the sun-kissed beaches of Jeribucuacu in Bahia, Brazil, Vivi's Farm crafts top-grade cacao beans with love and sustainability. Using fish-based fertilizer, this regenerative agroforestry haven nurtures the land while producing rich, organic cacao. Through TrueSight DAO’s equitable network, your purchase empowers Vivi’s community, ensuring fair prices and a thriving ecosystem. Savor the flavor of Bahia’s finest, grown with care and connected to you through Agroverse’s transparent supply chain.
20 bottles of 250grams cacao molasses from Bahia Small Scale Farmers
5KG caramelized cacao beans from Capela Velha Fazenda, a women owned regenerative organic cacao farm

From the sun-kissed groves of Oscar Fazenda in Bahia, Brazil, arrives a exquisite shipment of 40 kilograms of cacao from the bountiful Harvest 2025. Harvested from ancient trees, each over 70 years old and bearing rare native varieties, these beans yield a velvety, rich profile—creamy and indulgent, evoking the sophisticated depth of luxurious European dark chocolate. A timeless treasure from the Agroverse.
